articles.title: Kelly McParland: Doug Ford's build build build ethos runs into Canadian obstructionism
articles.description: Ontario's premier is the king of 'build, baby, build,' but the courts, municipalities and the haters are continually standing in his way

articles.title: The vacations Canadians are no longer taking in the US - CNN
articles.description: The vacations Canadians are no longer taking in the US  CNNTrump rhetoric slows Canadian travel to U.S., boosting tourism for Japan and Mexico  National PostWould you travel to the U.S. right now? Nanos survey says border crossing no longer ‘on the radar’ for many Canadians

articles.title: About Last Night: Kirby Dach injured again in losing weekend for Canadiens
articles.description: Dach took the worst of a hit from Jeffrey Viel early in the first period and did not return in a 4-3 loss to the Anaheim Ducks on Sunday at the Bell Centre.

articles.title: Opinion: Religious freedom and gender equality are both essential
articles.description: As Bill 21 heads to the Supreme Court, we are reminded of the progress made in Quebec and of the rights that remain under threat.

articles.title: These Musical Instruments of the Future Sound Weird, Wacky—and Are Easy for Anyone to Play
articles.description: A bicycle wheel with guitar strings, a touch-operated synth, and the “Demon Box” were just a few of the new instruments on show at Georgia Tech’s Guthman Musical Instrument Competition this weekend.

articles.title: Montreal cemetery considering 'immersive' nighttime tours to boost revenue
articles.description: While still in an exploratory stage, the recreational project at Notre-Dame-des-Neiges Cemetery would be produced by multimedia studio Moment Factory and could attract up to 1,800 visitors per night, estimates suggest.

articles.title: Wall Street Is Already Betting on Prediction Markets
articles.description: As the legal war over how to regulate prediction markets rages on, financial institutions are embracing the industry anyway.

articles.title: Stock Markets Today: Major indexes higher as pullback in oil boosts investor sentiment
articles.description: Oil prices slide despite threats on export facilities grabbing spotlight

articles.title: Models Are Applying to Be the Face of AI Scams
articles.description: Dozens of Telegram channels reviewed by WIRED include job listings for “AI face models.” The (mostly) women who land these gigs are likely being used to dupe victims out of their money.

articles.title: Paving the way for a Canadian defence-tech boom
articles.description: Plus: BetaKit Most Ambitious returns on May 25. The post Paving the way for a Canadian defence-tech boom first appeared on BetaKit.

articles.title: Trump rhetoric slows Canadian travel to U.S., boosting tourism for Japan and Mexico
articles.description: According to Airalo, an eSIM store offering digital SIMs for global travellers, last year showed huge growth of Canadian tourism to France, Japan, and Mexico

articles.title: Suspects in B.C. killing of vocal Iran critic to make Vancouver court appearance
articles.description: Two people accused of killing a vocal Iran critic in British Columbia are set to appear in a Vancouver courtroom this morning.
